## Meeting Purpose

[Executive interview with Suriya Sharma for the Chief of Staff role.](https://fathom.video/share/a7pp7kiC8RaMfvUJZ6PZxJAcN4qnHaU5?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Candidate Profile:** Suriya Sharma is a proven operator with a track record of scaling operations at startups (Mixpanel, Airtable) and leading a major product/process overhaul at Everlance.](https://fathom.video/share/a7pp7kiC8RaMfvUJZ6PZxJAcN4qnHaU5?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [**Key Project Success:** At Everlance, Sharma led a parallel product/process overhaul of reimbursement ops, eliminating a 10% error rate and 20% payment delay rate.](https://fathom.video/share/a7pp7kiC8RaMfvUJZ6PZxJAcN4qnHaU5?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [**Role Mandate:** The Chief of Staff will act as Marcel Santilli's operational extension, providing structure and accountability to manage the company's growth from $12M to $36M ARR.](https://fathom.video/share/a7pp7kiC8RaMfvUJZ6PZxJAcN4qnHaU5?tab=summary&timestamp=2476.0)
  - [**Next Step:** Sharma will complete a written assignment on a "marketplace" strategy for the company's production talent delivery model.](https://fathom.video/share/a7pp7kiC8RaMfvUJZ6PZxJAcN4qnHaU5?tab=summary&timestamp=2969.0)

## Topics

### Company Context & Role Need

  - [**Growth Trajectory:** The company is scaling rapidly, growing from \~$2M to $12M ARR last year with a goal of $36M ARR this year.](https://fathom.video/share/a7pp7kiC8RaMfvUJZ6PZxJAcN4qnHaU5?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [**Operational Model:** The business is operationally heavy, with a "build" side (AI workflows) and a "deliver" side (content creation).](https://fathom.video/share/a7pp7kiC8RaMfvUJZ6PZxJAcN4qnHaU5?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
      - [**Delivery Team:** \~55 of 90+ employees, serving 60+ customers at an average of $200k/year.](https://fathom.video/share/a7pp7kiC8RaMfvUJZ6PZxJAcN4qnHaU5?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
      - [**Margins:** Gross margin is \~70%.](https://fathom.video/share/a7pp7kiC8RaMfvUJZ6PZxJAcN4qnHaU5?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [**Role Rationale:** The company has outgrown its flat structure. The Chief of Staff will provide the operational systems, accountability, and structure needed for this next phase of scale.](https://fathom.video/share/a7pp7kiC8RaMfvUJZ6PZxJAcN4qnHaU5?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)

### Candidate Background & Experience

  - [**Career Path:** Consulting → Mixpanel (BizOps) → Airtable (Special Projects) → Everlance (BizOps → Head of Post-Sales).](https://fathom.video/share/a7pp7kiC8RaMfvUJZ6PZxJAcN4qnHaU5?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [**Motivation:** Driven by high-impact work and seeing the tangible results of process improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/a7pp7kiC8RaMfvUJZ6PZxJAcN4qnHaU5?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [**Current Situation:** Seeking a new role after Everlance's acquisition by a slow-moving, legacy company.](https://fathom.video/share/a7pp7kiC8RaMfvUJZ6PZxJAcN4qnHaU5?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)

### Deep Dive: Everlance Reimbursement Ops Project

  - [**Context:** Joined Everlance (35 employees) as an IC BizOps role reporting to the COO (Dan).](https://fathom.video/share/a7pp7kiC8RaMfvUJZ6PZxJAcN4qnHaU5?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [**Problem:** The B2B reimbursement process was a manual, spreadsheet-based system with critical failures.](https://fathom.video/share/a7pp7kiC8RaMfvUJZ6PZxJAcN4qnHaU5?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
      - [**Error Rate:** 10% of payments were incorrect.](https://fathom.video/share/a7pp7kiC8RaMfvUJZ6PZxJAcN4qnHaU5?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
      - [**Delay Rate:** 20% of customers were paid late.](https://fathom.video/share/a7pp7kiC8RaMfvUJZ6PZxJAcN4qnHaU5?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
  - [**Solution:** Led a parallel product/process overhaul, collaborating closely with the product team.](https://fathom.video/share/a7pp7kiC8RaMfvUJZ6PZxJAcN4qnHaU5?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)
      - [**Approach:** Incremental product features were built in lockstep with process changes, ensuring the ops team could adapt without disruption.](https://fathom.video/share/a7pp7kiC8RaMfvUJZ6PZxJAcN4qnHaU5?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)
      - [**First Win:** A simple CSV upload feature for driver rates eliminated the error-prone `INDEX/MATCH` step.](https://fathom.video/share/a7pp7kiC8RaMfvUJZ6PZxJAcN4qnHaU5?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
  - [**Outcome:** The project was handed off after achieving a 0% error rate and 0% delay rate. The process is now fully productized, with the ops team serving a QA function.](https://fathom.video/share/a7pp7kiC8RaMfvUJZ6PZxJAcN4qnHaU5?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)

### Management & Collaboration Style

  - [**Manager (Dan):** Described as a trusting leader who assumed success, which fostered growth.](https://fathom.video/share/a7pp7kiC8RaMfvUJZ6PZxJAcN4qnHaU5?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
  - [**Self-Assessment:**](https://fathom.video/share/a7pp7kiC8RaMfvUJZ6PZxJAcN4qnHaU5?tab=summary&timestamp=1557.0)
      - [**Strengths:** Drives projects to completion, proactive, scrappy, and an advocate for the customer.](https://fathom.video/share/a7pp7kiC8RaMfvUJZ6PZxJAcN4qnHaU5?tab=summary&timestamp=1557.0)
      - [**Feedback:** Needs to invest more in small talk to build relationships, a skill Sharma is actively developing.](https://fathom.video/share/a7pp7kiC8RaMfvUJZ6PZxJAcN4qnHaU5?tab=summary&timestamp=1808.0)
  - [**Collaboration:** Prefers hybrid/in-person work for faster learning and relationship-building.](https://fathom.video/share/a7pp7kiC8RaMfvUJZ6PZxJAcN4qnHaU5?tab=summary&timestamp=2774.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Marcel Santilli:**](https://fathom.video/share/a7pp7kiC8RaMfvUJZ6PZxJAcN4qnHaU5?tab=summary&timestamp=2949.0)
      - [Share the written assignment with Suriya Sharma via Bridget.](https://fathom.video/share/a7pp7kiC8RaMfvUJZ6PZxJAcN4qnHaU5?tab=summary&timestamp=2949.0)
      - [Invite Sharma to the Thursday breakfast event.](https://fathom.video/share/a7pp7kiC8RaMfvUJZ6PZxJAcN4qnHaU5?tab=summary&timestamp=2937.0)
  - [**Suriya Sharma:**](https://fathom.video/share/a7pp7kiC8RaMfvUJZ6PZxJAcN4qnHaU5?tab=summary&timestamp=2949.0)
      - [Complete the written assignment on a "marketplace" strategy for production talent.](https://fathom.video/share/a7pp7kiC8RaMfvUJZ6PZxJAcN4qnHaU5?tab=summary&timestamp=2969.0)
